The Lambda Priesthood is one of the three [[Priesthood|Priesthoods]] alongside the [[Omega Priesthood]] and the [[Alpha Priesthood]]

The Lambda Priesthood's job is running the [[Lambda Covenant]] so their main purpose is transmitting [[lambda teachings]] facilitating the application of [[Firmlaw]] and the [[ninefold vaccine]], running [[Sanhedrin]], and performing [[nobility tests]], and administering [[booster shots]]

{{Priestly Lineages}}
[[Category:Priesthood]]
[[sn:Lambda Priesthood]][[Category:Lambda]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
